description: Scotland vs Morocco; legs mapped to teams by groupItemTitle, away side (Morocco) favored.

polymarket.description: This event is for the upcoming FIFA World Cup game, scheduled for Friday, June 19, 2026 between Scotland and Morocco.

eventMetadata.context_description: Morocco enters as the narrow favorite in this 2026 World Cup Group C clash at Gillette Stadium, buoyed by a 1-1 draw against Brazil that showcased their defensive organization and possession dominance. Ranked seventh globally, the Atlas Lions have targeted wins over Scotland and Haiti to top the group, leveraging recent form and tactical discipline under their coaching setup. Scotland, appearing in their first World Cup since 1998 after a 1-0 victory over Haiti, face injury concerns with multiple players doubtful or ruled out, pushing them toward a compact, counter-attacking approach favored by manager Steve Clarke. Traders price the draw as the second-most likely outcome given the expected low-scoring, physical contest on neutral ground, while Scotland's underdog status reflects the quality gap despite their solid recent results.

markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for June 19, 2026
If Scotland wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
markets.question: Will Scotland win on 2026-06-19?
